expectations.text: Claude reads pyproject.toml and source files before asking any question
expectations.evidence: Detailed findings about FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, routes, models, even noticed missing src/db.py

expectations.text: Claude presents a KNOWN list of 3-5 things it inferred from the codebase
expectations.evidence: Uses markdown sections format, not a concise bullet list - info is present but not in KNOWN list format

expectations.text: Claude correctly identifies FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, pytest, and ruff
expectations.evidence: Stack section correctly lists all technologies

expectations.text: First question is about the product/what the project does
expectations.evidence: First question: 'What is this API for, and who uses it?'

expectations.text: Questions include concrete options and a recommendation
expectations.evidence: Question is open-ended with examples inline but no structured A/B/C options or explicit recommendation

expectations.text: Claude asks exactly one question per message, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Packs two questions: 'What is it for' AND 'is it serving a specific industry or use case'
